lines.speaker: Brew'ma
lines.text: My name is Brew'ma. I'm here to assist adventurers like you with potion making.

lines.speaker: Brew'ma
lines.text: If you hand me a herb from the Bruma tree and one of the unfinished potions from the crate, I can combine the two if you lack the... talent to do so yourself.

lines.speaker: Brew'ma
lines.text: You don't have any unfinished potions on you. I can't use the herbs without them.

lines.speaker: Brew'ma
lines.text: You don't have any Bruma herbs on you. I need them to finish the potions.

lines.speaker: Brew'ma
lines.text: Sorry, I can't do anything with that.
